title: storybook_clock frozen at 12:00
description: Acceptance test failure: demos/storybook_clock.py displays frozen 12:00 and does not progress. Fix clock URL/story args so rendered frames represent advancing current time.

comments.author: unknown
comments.text: Implemented fix: storybook_clock now renders per-frame Storybook URLs with explicit hour/minute/second args derived from wall-clock time (instead of static default story + t param). Validation: demo runs successfully after patch and enters push loop; awaiting user visual confirmation that clock time now advances on device.

comments.author: unknown
comments.text: User observed intermittent freeze after initial smooth motion. Root cause likely precomputed-frame replay without continuous time refresh in push mode. Applying fix to regenerate frame window from current time continuously.

comments.author: unknown
comments.text: User confirmed the original frozen-at-12:00 issue is resolved. Closing this bug. Further clock demo redesign/perf work continues under acceptance task kanbus-c5ae3b.
